dram.notes: DDR4 spot market eased ~1.2% WoW to $33.56 (1Gx8 3200MT/s). DDR5 contract prices still elevated but marginal softening in spot. DRAM cycle in later-stage upturn; mainstream DDR4 demand from PC OEM slowing into seasonal Q2 downturn. AI server demand remains strong (DDR5 HBM-aware) but pulling mixed-signal DRAM supply.

nand.notes: NAND ASP Index at $3.42 (+2.1% WoW). AI server SSD demand continues to lift QLC NAND contract pricing. NAND climbed 246% from start of 2025 through Dec per Kingston. QLC gaining share in datacenter. 2Q26 contract prices expected up 70-75% QoQ per TrendForce Mar 2026 guidance.

hbm.key_driver: SK Hynix HBM3E pre-booked by NVIDIA/OpenAI; Micron 1αnm HBM3E ramp; Samsung HBM yield issues
hbm.notes: HBM3E allocation TIGHT through 2026. SK Hynix commands ~60% HBM market share; 2026 capacity already sold out. Micron committing $200B US memory expansion (volume production 2027+). HBM consumes ~23% of total DRAM wafer capacity (TechInsider). SK Hynix flagging multi-year supply gap.

cxmt.impact: CXMT posting $8B revenue 2025 (+130% YoY); targeting domestic smartphone OEM supply; 2026 HBM3 development underway
cxmt.notes: CXMT on track for HBM3 production by end of 2026; third-gen HBM in development. Primary threat to foreign DRAM vendors in China smartphone market. U.S. export controls continue to restrict equipment access.

ymtc.impact: YMTC to become world's 3rd largest NAND producer; Wuhan fab ramp in 2026, mass production 2027; aggressive pricing threatening Samsung/Kioxia
ymtc.notes: YMTC advancing expansion plan with equipment move-in H2 2026. YMTC 2026 NAND output expected to challenge global ranking. US export controls (CHIPS Act / BIS EAR) limiting equipment procurement but domestic equipment suppliers (Naura, Maxwell) increasingly filling gap.

smartphone_bom.key_driver: DRAM + NAND simultaneous upcycle; HBM挤占消费级 DRAM 产能
smartphone_bom.impact_on_tam: 低价格手机受冲击最大；中价位手机($400-600)BOM上涨16-20%
smartphone_bom.notes: Counterpoint: 8GB LPDDR5X + 256GB UFS 4.0 BOM share now 14% (DRAM) + 11% (NAND) = 25% total per device. Budget Android phone model survival risk elevated into 2026-2027.

cycle_position.key_signal: NAND contract prices +70-75% QoQ 2Q26 guidance; DRAM upcycle entering later stage (PC OEM需求走弱); HBM持续短缺
cycle_position.risk_to_view: PC/消费电子需求进一步疲软可能拖累DDR4价格; 中国手机OEM因BOM压力可能下修出货目标
